# 💬 Discussions Guide

Welcome to the **Universal Video Downloader** community! Discussions are the place
for questions, ideas, and show-and-tell — issues are only for confirmed bugs and
concrete feature requests.

## Which category should I use?

| Category | Use it for |
|----------|-----------|
| 🙋 **Q&A** | "How do I…?" questions (setup, cookies, deployment) |
| 💡 **Ideas** | Feature suggestions before they become issues |
| 🙌 **Show and tell** | Share your deployment, theme, or integration |
| 📣 **Announcements** | Maintainer updates (read-only) |
| 🗣️ **General** | Anything else |

## Before you post

- 🔎 Search existing discussions and [issues](https://github.com/PatvakanGasparyan/Universal_Video_Downloader/issues).
- 📚 Check the docs: [FAQ](../docs/FAQ.md) · [Troubleshooting](../docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md) · [Cookies](../docs/COOKIES.md).
- ⬆️ Confirm you're on the latest version and updated `yt-dlp`.

## Posting a good question

1. Describe your goal and what you tried.
2. Include environment (OS, Docker/native, versions).
3. Paste **redacted** logs (never share `cookies.txt` or secrets).
4. Link the exact URL type/site (not private links).

## Be respectful

All discussions follow our [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md). Be kind and constructive. 🙏
